response.justification: The candidate has extensive overall software development experience and demonstrates strong engineering practices, including CI/CD. However, he critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development, showing only a brief C/C++ role, and has no demonstrable experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking, which are core requirements for this role. His experience is heavily weighted towards web technologies and DLang.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (10+ years)
Proficiency in modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, agile)
Experience with various technologies and full-stack development
concerns: Minimal professional C++ development experience (only 7 months explicitly mentioned)
No demonstrable experience in capital markets or fixed income domains
Lack of specific strong SQL Server/Oracle experience
